title: Dangerous goods safety advisers review
body: "The Department for Transport ran a call for evidence about the role of dangerous goods safety advisers (DGSAs) from 3 October 2024 until 17 January 2025.  The call for evidence asked DGSAs and employers about:   their experience the challenges they face how government can help   292 respondents took part in the survey including 268 DGSAs, representing around 12% (at time of the survey) of the total cohort of DGSAs in the UK.  "
